description_long: This object is a handheld gaming console with a rectangular central screen flanked by two detachable controllers, one blue and one white. The front features a large display with visible game icons and user interface elements, surrounded by a black bezel. The left controller is blue and includes a joystick and several buttons, while the right controller is white with a matching set of controls. The back of the device is matte black and prominently displays the Nintendo Switch logo, along with regulatory markings and a game card slot. The device is slim, with a profile that shows the controllers slightly protruding from the sides. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with some metal internal components, designed for portability and ergonomic handheld use.
description: A handheld gaming console with a large central screen, blue and white detachable controllers, and a matte black back with the Nintendo Switch logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, blue left controller, and white right controller with visible buttons and joysticks.
description_view_1: Side profile view highlighting the slimness of the device and the white controller's edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte black back, Nintendo Switch logo, and regulatory markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile view showing the blue controller's edge and the device's thin form.
